Source   Edit  
Deprecated: not up to date

Imports

load_reader, load_buffer, reader_common

Types

BufferView = cstring
Source   Edit   
LoadReaderView = ptr LoadReader
Source   Edit   
LoadViewReader = object
  bufferView*: BufferView
  when BufferView is cstring:
    bufferViewLen*: int
  readerPtr*: LoadReaderView
view type over the LoadReader type, to reduce pointer dereferences Source   Edit
